\tzpentry{ID5531}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5531 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f(\phi) = 2\Omega \sin\phi \approx \beta\, y, \qquad \beta = \frac{2\Omega}{R}, \qquad y = R(\phi - \pi/2), \end{equation}
